headline: BAE Systems – Trading update
summary: LONDON, May 07, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- BAE Systems is providing the following market update ahead of its Annual General Meeting today. Highlights: Strong operational and financial performance so far in 2026.Full year guidance maintained.Increased defence spending across all our key markets.Well positioned for growth over the medium term. headline: Howmet Aerospace (HWM) Appoints Jonathan Arena as Executive VP and Chief Legal Officer
summary: Howmet Aerospace Inc. (NYSE:HWM) is one of the best growth stocks to invest in for the next 2 years. On April 13, Howmet Aerospace appointed Jonathan Arena as its new Executive Vice President, Chief Legal & Compliance Officer, and Secretary.
